name: Electronics & Navigation
description: Marine electronics for navigation, communication, and situational awareness.
seoIntro: Electronics and navigation gear is the command center of any modern vessel, whether you run a trailerable bay boat, a bluewater cruiser, or a weekend pontoon. At Sea Supply Hub, this category is structured to help you compare marine chartplotters, fishfinders, radar systems, AIS safety tools, and communication equipment in one place. We focus on practical selection guidance, installation considerations, and compatibility notes so you can match your helm layout, power budget, and boating style without guesswork. You will find product highlights that break down screen readability, transducer choices, mapping support, and network expandability, plus support content that explains real-world setup tradeoffs. Our affiliate model lets you research confidently, then buy from trusted marine partners. Every listing includes specs, feature callouts, and direct partner links so you can move from research to purchase quickly while still getting the depth expected from an enterprise marine retailer.

name: Anchor & Docking
description: Anchors, rodes, windlasses, fenders, and mooring essentials.
seoIntro: A secure anchoring and docking setup protects your boat, your crew, and the vessels around you. This section covers complete systems instead of one-off parts so you can build a reliable setup from bow roller to cleat. Explore anchors by bottom type, anchor rodes by chain and rope combination, fender options by hull profile, and docking accessories designed for quick, repeatable tie-ups in changing conditions. We include practical guidance for sizing anchors to displacement and windage, selecting line materials for stretch and abrasion resistance, and planning safe retrieval with manual or electric windlasses. Category pages are organized for fast filtering and include related buying guides to reduce costly mismatches. Since Sea Supply Hub is affiliate-first, product pages focus on clear specs, setup context, and partner purchase links. You get retail-level depth and shopping clarity without checkout friction, while keeping the platform ready for full ecommerce expansion later.

name: Safety
description: Life jackets, signaling gear, survival and emergency equipment.
seoIntro: Safety equipment should be easy to find, easy to inspect, and ready before weather changes or route complexity increases. Sea Supply Hub organizes marine safety gear by real onboard use cases: required carriage items, offshore preparedness, crew visibility, and emergency communications. Compare life jackets by activity profile and comfort, select signaling tools for daylight and low-visibility conditions, and review emergency kits built for coastal or extended passages. We emphasize durability, standards alignment, and practical storage so equipment stays serviceable season after season. Product pages include quick highlights and clear specification tables, while resource content helps you set up maintenance intervals and expiration checks for flares, batteries, and inflation systems. This approach supports both new boat owners and experienced skippers who want to refresh aging kits with confidence. With affiliate partner links, you can complete your purchase at established retailers after validating fit, features, and compliance details.

name: Marine Electrical
description: Batteries, charging, inverters, breakers, and power systems.
seoIntro: Reliable electrical infrastructure is the backbone of safe electronics operation, overnight comfort, and dependable engine starts. This category helps you design and maintain 12V and 24V marine systems with clear product segmentation for charging, distribution, storage, and protection. Compare battery chemistries, onboard chargers, inverters, and busbar or breaker configurations based on load profiles and space constraints. We highlight practical factors such as heat management, wire routing, fuse placement, and corrosion mitigation in saltwater environments so installations stay dependable over time. Product detail pages include fitment notes and compatibility pointers where applicable, and related guides explain common upgrade paths such as lead-acid to LiFePO4 transitions. Whether you are modernizing a cruising boat or cleaning up a weekend wiring project, Sea Supply Hub gives you a clear research path and direct partner links to complete purchase through trusted marine suppliers.

name: Boat Maintenance
description: Cleaning, polishing, anti-fouling, detailing, and service tools.
seoIntro: Consistent maintenance protects resale value, improves reliability, and helps prevent expensive in-season failures. The Boat Maintenance category is curated around practical upkeep cycles: hull cleaning, corrosion prevention, seasonal detailing, and routine inspections. Find marine-safe soaps and cleaners, compounding and polishing systems, anti-fouling coatings, and storage prep products designed for different hull materials and water conditions. We structure content to support both quick weekend tasks and full preseason overhauls, with guide links that explain step-by-step workflows and recommended product pairings. Listings include concise feature highlights, specification data where relevant, and compatibility notes to reduce material mismatches across gelcoat, painted surfaces, or metal fittings. Sea Supply Hub keeps these pages information-rich and search-friendly, while affiliate CTAs send buyers to trusted partner stores to complete transactions. The result is a high-confidence maintenance shopping experience designed for scale.
